---
name: Device support request
about: Request support for a new device or sensor
title: "[Device] "
labels: device-support
assignees: ""
---

**Device/Sensor**
Name and model of the device or sensor.

**Communication protocol**
How it communicates (I2C, SPI, UART, GPIO, etc.)

**What it does**
Sensors it has, actuators it controls.

**Existing library**
Link to Arduino/PlatformIO library if one exists.

**WoT TD draft (optional)**
If you've started writing a Thing Description for it, paste it here.
